journal_entry.description: Purchase machinery for factory expansion with freight, installation, and testing costs
journal_entry.rationale: Under IAS 16, the cost of PP&E includes purchase price plus all costs directly attributable to bringing the asset to the location and condition necessary for its intended use. Freight ($30,000), installation ($20,000), and testing/commissioning ($50,000) are capitalized as part of machinery cost. Total machinery cost = $700,000 + $30,000 + $20,000 + $50,000 = $800,000. The $700,000 is on account (accounts payable increases), while $100,000 was paid by cheque (cash decreases). HST is added on all components at 13% for Ontario.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Machinery purchase with directly attributable costs capitalized per IAS 16. One asset increase (machinery at $800k total cost), one liability increase (AP for $700k + HST), one asset decrease (cash for $100k + HST). HST at 13% applied to all components ($800k × 13% = $104k).
